# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 3.6. Charter-Party Carrier Safety Equipment [27425 - 27427]
##### § 27426

No later than July 1, 2018, the department shall adopt standards and criteria for the implementation of the safety equipment requirements specified in Section 27425.

*(Added by Stats. 2016, Ch. 705, Sec. 2. (SB 247) Effective January 1, 2017.)*

subsections.text: No later than July 1, 2018, the department shall adopt standards and criteria for the implementation of the safety equipment requirements specified in Section 27425.
